name: sdlc-rstack
description: The RStack governed SDLC loop as native Claude Code slash commands — /sdlc-start, /sdlc-plan, /sdlc-build-next, /sdlc-validate, /sdlc-approve, and the rest of the sdlc_* tool surface, driven through the same harness (src/core/harness/) that backs Pi. Ships the orchestrator/builder/validator team alongside the commands.
